findings.landing_page_flow: Invest Now on ivxholding.com calls /api/ivx/payments/landing-intent, which writes a real pending_payment row to the transactions table and a linked landing_investments row with immutable audit logging.
findings.in_app_flow: PaymentService rejects simulated payments in production when no provider is configured. Pending transactions are created for owner/admin confirmation after real funds are received.
findings.admin_visibility: app/admin/transactions.tsx reads both transactions and landing_investments tables and merges them, so landing-generated intents appear in the app admin payment transactions view.
removed_indicators: expo/components/InvestorDisclosure.tsx: removed 'Payment processing is in demo mode' banner
expo/lib/production-readiness.ts: updated 'No payment provider' message to describe pending owner confirmation instead of simulated
expo/app/backend-audit.tsx: updated payment service audit item to 'Real transaction records only'
findings.auth_fix: Landing page Invest Now now sends the Supabase access token in the Authorization header. Backend /api/ivx/payments/landing-intent verifies the token and uses the authenticated user_id for the real transaction record.

evidence.live_backend_version: GET https://api.ivxholding.com/api/ivx/version -> commit f531009c, environment production, booted 2026-07-06T01:04:06Z
evidence.live_api_unauthenticated_probe: POST /api/ivx/payments/landing-intent without Authorization -> HTTP 401, error 'Investor must be authenticated before creating a real payment transaction.'
